allow: Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '..'\); from tantan.backend.utils import get_logger; print\('OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '..'\); from tantan.backend.utils.logger import get_logger; print\('OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\); from tantan.backend.utils import get_logger; print\('OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\); print\(sys.path[:5]\); import tantan; print\(tantan\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\); import os; print\(os.path.exists\('__init__.py'\), os.path.exists\('tantan'\)\); from tantan.backend.utils import get_logger; print\('OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys; print\('\\\\n'.join\(sys.path[:5]\)\); print\('---'\); import os; os.chdir\('..'\); print\(os.getcwd\(\), os.listdir\('.'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\); print\('path[0]:', sys.path[0]\); import tantan.backend.utils.logger")
